items.situation: An aircraft is dangerously low and you need to issue a low-altitude alert immediately. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: LOW ALTITUDE ALERT CESSNA THREE FOUR JULIETT CHECK YOUR ALTITUDE IMMEDIATELY

items.situation: GPS has been reported unreliable in the area thirty miles south of Waco VOR. Build the broadcast.
items.target_phrase: ATTENTION ALL AIRCRAFT GPS REPORTED UNRELIABLE IN THE AREA THREE ZERO MILES SOUTH OF WACO VOR

items.situation: An aircraft will stay on your sector but must move to another frequency you control. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: UNITED TWO TWENTY-TWO CHANGE TO MY FREQUENCY ONE TWO THREE POINT FOUR

items.situation: A pilot requests an operation and you can approve it without restriction. Build the response.
items.target_phrase: APPROVED AS REQUESTED

items.situation: A following aircraft needs a wake-turbulence caution for a heavy Boeing 747 departing Runway 27. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: CAUTION WAKE TURBULENCE HEAVY BOEING SEVEN FORTY-SEVEN DEPARTING RUNWAY TWO SEVEN

items.situation: You are issuing a radar traffic advisory for a converging Boeing 727 at eleven o'clock, ten miles, southbound, at 17,000 feet. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: TRAFFIC ELEVEN O'CLOCK ONE ZERO MILES SOUTHBOUND CONVERGING BOEING SEVEN TWENTY-SEVEN ONE SEVEN THOUSAND

items.situation: A UAS is reported two miles east of Brandywine Airport at 300 feet and below. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: UNMANNED AIRCRAFT SYSTEM ACTIVITY TWO MILES EAST OF BRANDYWINE AIRPORT THREE HUNDRED FEET AND BELOW

items.situation: A flock of geese was last reported at 4,000 feet, one o'clock, seven miles, northbound. Build the bird advisory.
items.target_phrase: FLOCK OF GEESE ONE O'CLOCK SEVEN MILES NORTHBOUND LAST REPORTED AT FOUR THOUSAND

items.situation: A wheels-down check is required before final approach descent. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: CHECK WHEELS DOWN

items.situation: You need to notify N123AB of a possible pilot deviation and give a callback number for Chicago Approach. Build the notification.
items.target_phrase: NOVEMBER ONE TWO THREE ALFA BRAVO POSSIBLE PILOT DEVIATION ADVISE YOU CONTACT CHICAGO APPROACH AT FIVE FIVE FIVE ONE TWO ONE TWO

items.situation: A non-RVSM aircraft requests entry into RVSM airspace. Build the denial.
items.target_phrase: UNABLE CLEARANCE INTO RVSM AIRSPACE

items.situation: American Two needs a revised flight level of 330. Build the amended transmission.
items.target_phrase: AMERICAN TWO REVISED FLIGHT LEVEL THREE THREE ZERO

items.situation: You need to state the call sign of a government sampling aircraft. Build the identity.
items.target_phrase: SAMP THREE ONE SIX

items.situation: You need to state the approved equipment suffix for a Cessna 310 with suffix Tango. Build the phraseology.
items.target_phrase: CESSNA THREE-TEN SLANT TANGO

items.situation: False ATC instructions have been reported near Long Beach Airport. Build the warning broadcast.
items.target_phrase: ATTENTION ALL AIRCRAFT FALSE ATC INSTRUCTIONS HAVE BEEN RECEIVED IN THE AREA OF LONG BEACH AIRPORT EXERCISE EXTREME CAUTION ON ALL FREQUENCIES AND VERIFY INSTRUCTIONS

items.situation: You are calling Washington Approach from Washington Center on the Fifty Seven line. Build the caller identification.
items.target_phrase: WASHINGTON CENTER WASHINGTON APPROACH ON THE FIFTY SEVEN LINE

items.situation: You are addressing United 58 Heavy. Build the call sign using approved phraseology.
items.target_phrase: UNITED FIFTY-EIGHT HEAVY

items.situation: Two similar call signs are on frequency and you need to emphasize the first one clearly. Build the emphasized call sign.
items.target_phrase: UNITED THIRTY-ONE UNITED

items.situation: You are issuing the surface wind of 030 at 25 knots. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: WIND ZERO THREE ZERO AT TWO FIVE

items.situation: A pilot seems uncertain about frequency 126.55 and you want to clarify both ways of saying it. Build the clarification.
items.target_phrase: ONE TWO SIX POINT FIVE FIVE ONE TWENTY SIX POINT FIFTY FIVE

items.situation: You are identifying the Navy Jacksonville tower position. Build the facility identification.
items.target_phrase: NAVY JACKSONVILLE TOWER

items.situation: You are issuing traffic information and need to describe the traffic as a blue and white King Air. Build the description.
items.target_phrase: BLUE AND WHITE KING AIR

items.situation: Cessna 123MR is being cleared into Class Bravo airspace. Build the clearance.
items.target_phrase: CESSNA ONE TWO THREE MIKE ROMEO CLEARED TO ENTER BRAVO AIRSPACE

items.situation: You need to state the route designator for North American Route 67 Bravo. Build the phraseology.
items.target_phrase: NORTH AMERICAN ROUTE SIXTY-SEVEN BRAVO

items.situation: You need to describe a 20-mile arc southwest of Kirksville VOR. Build the phraseology.
items.target_phrase: TWO ZERO MILE ARC SOUTHWEST OF KIRKSVILLE VOR

items.situation: You need to state the Appleton 050 radial 37-mile fix. Build the fix description.
items.target_phrase: APPLETON ZERO FIVE ZERO RADIAL THREE SEVEN MILE FIX

items.situation: You want a pilot report over Joliet VOR. Build the solicitation.
items.target_phrase: REQUEST SAY FLIGHT CONDITIONS OVER JOLIET V O R

items.situation: You cannot approve the requested weather deviation and must instead vector the aircraft thirty degrees right for traffic. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: UNABLE REQUESTED DEVIATION TURN THIRTY DEGREES RIGHT VECTOR FOR TRAFFIC ADVISE CLEAR OF WEATHER

items.situation: You are broadcasting a hazardous weather advisory for CWA 27 covering severe thunderstorms in the Chicago area. Build the broadcast.
items.target_phrase: ATTENTION ALL AIRCRAFT HAZARDOUS WEATHER INFORMATION CWA TWO SEVEN FOR SEVERE THUNDERSTORMS WITHIN THE CHICAGO AREA AVAILABLE ON FLIGHT SERVICE FREQUENCIES

items.situation: You must issue the Wichita altimeter setting of 30.01, and the report is more than one hour old. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: THE WICHITA ALTIMETER THREE ZERO ZERO ONE MORE THAN ONE HOUR OLD

items.situation: The altimeter is 31.06 and high-barometric-pressure restrictions are in effect for an arrival. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: ALTIMETER THREE ONE ZERO SIX HIGH BAROMETRIC PRESSURE RESTRICTIONS IN EFFECT SET THREE ONE ZERO ZERO UNTIL REACHING THE FINAL APPROACH FIX

items.situation: Runway 27 Right RVR is 1,000, mid 800, rollout 600. Build the visibility report.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY TWO SEVEN RIGHT RVR ONE THOUSAND MID EIGHT HUNDRED ROLLOUT SIX HUNDRED

items.situation: The ATIS has changed to Information Charlie, and numerous flocks of ducks are in the immediate vicinity of Madison Airport at unknown altitude. Build the broadcast update.
items.target_phrase: ATTENTION ALL AIRCRAFT INFORMATION CHARLIE CURRENT NUMEROUS FLOCKS OF DUCKS IN THE IMMEDIATE VICINITY OF MADISON AIRPORT ALTITUDE UNKNOWN

items.situation: You need to include an unauthorized laser illumination event on the ATIS: 0100 Zulu, eight-mile final Runway 18 Right, 3,000 feet, green laser from the southwest. Build the report.
items.target_phrase: UNAUTHORIZED LASER ILLUMINATION EVENT AT ZERO ONE ZERO ZERO ZULU EIGHT MILE FINAL RUNWAY ONE EIGHT RIGHT AT THREE THOUSAND FEET GREEN LASER FROM THE SOUTHWEST
